sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100963" key="su/ntarros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σύνταρρ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ταρρός, ταρσός</etym>) <sense id="n100963.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">interwoven, entangled</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δένδρον ς</foreign>. a tree <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with interlacing roots</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg002:3:7:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.7.2</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg002:10:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
